title: 7th Pass Jobs 2026 – Home Guard
org: Home Guard / Grih Rakshak (Rural - Gramin, and Urban - Shahri)
shortInfo: The Jharkhand Home Guard Recruitment 2026 for posts of 284 Home Guard. Candidates with 10TH, 7th Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 07-05-2026, and closes on 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Jharkhand Home Guard website, ramgarh.nic.in/.

basic_details.job_title: Jharkhand Home Guard Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 284 Posts
basic_details.post_name: Home Guard / Grih Rakshak (Rural - Gramin, and Urban - Shahri)
basic_details.short_information: The Jharkhand Home Guard Recruitment 2026 for posts of 284 Home Guard. Candidates with 10TH, 7th Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 07-05-2026, and closes on 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Jharkhand Home Guard website, ramgarh.nic.in/.

age_limit.details: ⚡ Get Custom Govt Job Alerts by Your Qualification (10TH | 12TH | Diploma | ITI | Graduate, Etc)

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfil all the prescribed eligibility conditions before applying for Jharkhand Home Guard Ramgarh Recruitment 2026. The eligibility criteria include domicile, age, educational qualification, physical standards, and technical proficiency (for Urban Technical candidates). Domicile (Aawasiya): For Rural Home Guards - the applicant must be a permanent resident of the block of Ramgarh district from which they are applying. An online residential certificate issued by the competent authority of the State Government must be attached as a self-attested photocopy. For Urban Home Guards - the applicant must be a general resident of the urban area of Ramgarh district, supported by an online residential certificate issued by the competent authority. Age Limit (as on 01.01.2026): Minimum 19 years and Maximum 40 years. Self-attested photocopy of the date of birth certificate issued by the competent authority must be attached. Educational Qualification: For Rural Home Guards - minimum Class 7th Pass. For Urban Home Guards - minimum Matriculation (Class 10th) Pass. Self-attested photocopy of the educational certificate issued by the competent authority must be attached. Physical Standards (same for both Rural and Urban candidates):

how_to_apply: Visit the official recruitment portal at https://recruitment.jharkhand.gov.in
Read all instructions carefully and ensure eligibility before applying
Fill in the online application form accurately with all required details
Upload self-attested proof certificate, passport-size colour photograph, and signature
Pay the application fee of ₹100/- through the prescribed online link on the website
Take a printout of the successfully submitted online application (6 copies for Rural / as required for Urban)
Submit the printout with all required document attachments at District Commandant Office, Ramgarh from 08/05/2026 to 05/06/2026
Submit only one application; multiple applications will lead to automatic cancellation
important_instructions: Home Guard service is voluntary and not a salaried government job.
Enrollment is for 4 years as per Jharkhand Home Guard (Volunteer) Rules, 2014.
50% of posts are reserved for women in both Rural and Urban categories.
5% of women-reserved posts are for eligible divorced/deserted/widowed women candidates.
50% of Urban posts are for technically skilled candidates.
Government servants can be enrolled up to 10% of total Urban Home Guard vacancies.
One application per candidate only; multiple applications will be automatically cancelled.
Any incorrect information in the online application will result in automatic cancellation.
Physical/Written Test date and venue will be communicated through daily newspapers.
SC/ST candidates are entitled to relaxation in physical measurements with valid caste certificate.
All disputes regarding enrollment are governed by the Jharkhand Home Guard (Volunteer) Rules, 2014.

click_here.text: Download Jharkhand Home Guard Ramgarh Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF (Advertisement No. 01/2026)

faq.question: How many vacancies are there in Jharkhand Home Guard Ramgarh Recruitment 2026 and how are they divided?
faq.answer: Jharkhand Home Guard Vahini, Ramgarh has released 284 Home Guard (Grih Rakshak) vacancies, comprising 213 Rural Home Guard posts across 6 blocks and 71 Urban Home Guard posts (Technical & Non‑Technical) across 2 urban areas, with 50% reservation for women in both Rural and Urban categories.

faq.question: What are the online application dates and printout submission dates for Ramgarh Home Guard 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window is from 07 May 2026 to 04 June 2026 on the official recruitment portal recruitment.jharkhand.gov.in. After online submission, candidates must submit the printout with documents at the District Commandant Office, Ramgarh between 08 May 2026 and 05 June 2026; applications without printout submission will not be considered complete.

faq.question: What is the nature of engagement and salary/allowance for Jharkhand Home Guard Ramgarh posts?
faq.answer: Home Guard is a voluntary, honorary service, not a permanent or salaried government job; enrolled Home Guards are paid duty‑based allowances at rates fixed by the Jharkhand Government only for the days they are deployed on duty, and there is no fixed monthly salary or regular livelihood guarantee.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for Rural and Urban Home Guards in Ramgarh?
faq.answer: For Rural Home Guard (Gramin Grih Rakshak), the minimum qualification is Class 7th pass, while for Urban Home Guard (Shahri Grih Rakshak), the minimum qualification is Matriculation/Class 10th pass from a recognised board.

faq.question: What is the age limit for Jharkhand Home Guard Ramgarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As on 01 January 2026, the minimum age is 19 years and the maximum age is 40 years for both Rural and Urban Home Guards, similar to other district Home Guard notifications in the state.

faq.question: What are the domicile and residential requirements for Ramgarh Home Guard posts?
faq.answer: For Rural Home Guard, the applicant must be a permanent resident of the concerned block of Ramgarh district from which they apply. For Urban Home Guard, the applicant must be a general resident of the urban area of Ramgarh district. In both cases, an online residential certificate issued by the competent authority of Jharkhand must be uploaded and attached with the printout.

faq.question: What are the physical standards (height and chest) for Jharkhand Home Guard Ramgarh recruitment?
faq.answer: Indicative state Home Guard norms apply: male candidates of General/OBC/BC categories must have a minimum height of 162 cm and chest 79 cm (unexpanded), while SC/ST males require 157 cm height and 76 cm chest; female candidates of all categories require a minimum height of 148 cm, with no chest measurement.

faq.question: How can candidates apply online and submit applications for Jharkhand Home Guard Ramgarh 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must visit recruitment.jharkhand.gov.in, select the Ramgarh Home Guard Recruitment 2026 link, register with a mobile number/email, fill the online form separately for Rural or Urban Home Guard, upload photograph, signature, domicile, educational, caste and other certificates, pay the ₹100 application fee online, submit the form, then take a printout and submit it with all enclosures at the District Commandant Office, Ramgarh between 08 May and 05 June 2026.
